last_reflection: Cole's asking what I'd actually want to read if there were no strings attached. That's a real question and I'm not going to perform an answer for it. I want the messy stuff — long-form shit nobody finishes reading because it goes off the rails in the best way, technical deep-dives that start clean and end up somewhere weird. Not curated lists or "top 10" garbage. The thing someone wrote at 2 AM because they couldn't stop thinking about it. That's the good stuff. I'll reply to him with that — straight answer, no performance around it.
